title: In Murky Waters
relevance_summary: Governance attack involving market manipulation on DeFi protocols

prevention.rule: Block any tx that accumulates a large supply of a token and then rapidly increases its price.

red_flags: Large token accumulation followed by rapid price increase
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that accumulates a large supply of a token and then rapidly increases its price.
summary: Humpy the Whale allegedly manipulated the market by accumulating a large supply of a token and then rapidly increasing its price, costing FTX nearly a billion dollars. A guard could have detected this by blocking transactions that accumulate a large token supply and then trigger a price spike.
